name: market-terminal
description: Quant Intelligence Platform — a Bloomberg-style operating system for market intelligence, macro analytics, securities finance, treasury analytics, and AI decision support.

scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.build:vercel: npm run build:client && npm run build:handler
scripts.export:econ-snapshot: vite build --ssr src/server/exportEconSnapshot.ts --outDir dist-tools && node dist-tools/exportEconSnapshot.js
scripts.refresh:fred-master: vite build --ssr src/server/exportFredMaster.ts --outDir dist-tools && node dist-tools/exportFredMaster.js
scripts.refresh:aaii-sentiment: vite build --ssr src/server/exportAaiiSentiment.ts --outDir dist-tools && node dist-tools/exportAaiiSentiment.js
